init.title: RFID Jukebox Options
init.description: Update the configuration for the RFID Jukebox.

map_tag.name: Map Tag to Media
map_tag.description: Creates a new mapping between an RFID tag ID and a media item (playlist or folder).

tag_id.name: Tag ID
tag_id.description: The unique identifier of the RFID tag.

media_type.name: Media Type
media_type.description: The type of media to map (playlist or folder).

media_name.name: Media Name
media_name.description: The name of the playlist or folder path to map.

alias.name: Alias
alias.description: A friendly name for this tag (shown in UI).
